capture_method: Sanctioned web search via Claude Code agent proxy (2026-06-29). This environment's egress policy returns HTTP 403 on source hosts and throttles web.archive.org (429), so original-form bytes are not held. Canonical URL + verbatim text verified; promote with capture.sh --promote from an open-egress environment.
original_form_capture: PENDING: requires open-egress capture.sh --promote (source hosts return 403 in this environment).
notes: CNN/Slate/NPR/CNBC coverage establishing the convergence is reported openly (declaration-mode, Entry 16 sibling) and is not an artifact of one source's framing. Context/corroboration only; not a primary on any single contested fact.
